title: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Backend engineer with nine years of experience building event-driven data pipelines and cloud infrastructure on AWS. Led a 12-service Kubernetes migration, introduced Terraform across the platform team, and built the observability stack that cut mean time to detection from 25 to 4 minutes. Mentored six engineers and drives alignment through design documents.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Design and operate a multi-tenant event ingestion pipeline in Go and Kafka processing 40M events/day with p99 latency under 250ms
Led migration of 12 services from EC2 to Kubernetes (EKS), cutting infrastructure costs by 30% and deploy time from 45 to 8 minutes
Introduced Terraform across the platform team; all new infrastructure has been provisioned as code since 2022
Built the on-call observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty), reducing mean time to detection from 25 to 4 minutes
Wrote the design document for and led implementation of a usage-based billing service handling $2M ARR

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built REST and GraphQL APIs in TypeScript (Node.js) for a B2B analytics product serving 300 enterprise customers
Redesigned the PostgreSQL reporting schema, speeding up the slowest dashboard queries by 12x
Mentored two junior hires and ran a biweekly tech talk series
